analysis: The project has a 'docs' folder that seems to be the main documentation or informational page about black holes. The current files are basic and need enhancements to align with the black hole theme and include animated objects and slides. The HTML structure is minimal, the CSS lacks the cosmic theme, and the JavaScript is incomplete for interactive elements.

improvements.description: Enhance the HTML structure to include sections for animated slides about black holes, interactive elements, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu.
Update the CSS to include a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and Egyptian-themed color palette.
Complete the JavaScript to add functionality for animated slides, interactive elements, and mobile menu toggle with smooth transitions.
